Game: The Incredible Crash Dummies 1993 The Crash Dummies are going to pieces! That mechanical mishap, Junkman’, has kidnapped dummy designer, Dr. Zub’! To get him back, it's up to Slick’ to "hit the road" at the Crash Test Center, "shake a leg" at the Construction Site, and "stick his neck out" in the Military Testing Zone! Meanwhile, those screw-loose Junkbots’ are revving up to end this dummy do-gooding! The future of safety is in your hands ... don't lose your head! 1 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/93367454-41aa-4534-96f6-587d497106fd.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/f53a8eed-149c-42d6-8cc6-2febdacc2713.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/2cd4e344-f8f2-4bf1-8572-9782841c46c9.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/4db1287e-e466-4e6d-9c9f-9bdb8474c36b.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/38fe252b-f077-4cb3-bf27-1c51ba8523f8.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/fc53606b-f1fd-48b5-a6f4-cb7c8a23b0fc.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/7020dd61-351d-44cb-b6c6-96edb3e938ec.png Not Rated Platform Gray Matter LJN
